fields.name: claim_number
fields.description: Unique claim identifier assigned by payer (X12 835 CLM01 or payer-assigned reference number)

fields.name: patient_name
fields.description: Full name of the patient (Last, First Middle or First Last format)

fields.name: patient_dob
fields.description: Patient date of birth, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: patient_member_id
fields.description: Health plan member/subscriber ID number

fields.name: provider_name
fields.description: Name of the billing/rendering provider or group practice

fields.name: provider_npi
fields.description: National Provider Identifier (NPI) of billing provider — 10-digit numeric

fields.name: rendering_provider_npi
fields.description: NPI of the actual rendering/treating provider if different from billing provider

fields.name: payer_name
fields.description: Name of the insurance company or health plan paying the claim

fields.name: payer_id
fields.description: Payer's electronic ID or NAIC code

fields.name: group_number
fields.description: Patient's insurance group number

fields.name: date_of_service_from
fields.description: Start date of service, format YYYY-MM-DD (CMS-1500 Box 24A From)

fields.name: date_of_service_to
fields.description: End date of service, format YYYY-MM-DD (CMS-1500 Box 24A To); same as from if single-day service

fields.name: procedure_codes
fields.description: Array of CPT/HCPCS procedure codes billed (e.g., ["99213", "93000"]). Each entry is a string. Include modifiers as suffix if present (e.g., "99213-25")

fields.name: diagnosis_codes
fields.description: Array of ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes (e.g., ["I10", "E11.9"]). Extract all listed diagnosis pointers

fields.name: billed_amount
fields.description: Total amount billed/charged by provider as decimal (CMS-1500 Box 28 or EOB "Billed" column total)

fields.name: allowed_amount
fields.description: Payer-allowed/contracted amount as decimal (EOB "Allowed" or "Eligible" amount)

fields.name: paid_amount
fields.description: Amount actually paid by payer to provider as decimal (X12 835 BPR02 or EOB "Plan Paid" amount)

fields.name: patient_responsibility
fields.description: Total amount patient owes (copay + coinsurance + deductible) as decimal

fields.name: claim_status
fields.description: Adjudication outcome. One of: Paid | Denied | Pending | Adjusted

fields.name: denial_reason_code
fields.description: ANSI X12 835 Group/Claim Adjustment Reason Code (CARC) if denied or adjusted (e.g., "96", "CO-4", "PR-1"). Null if claim was fully paid

fields.name: remark_codes
fields.description: Array of Remittance Advice Remark Codes (RARC) associated with the claim (e.g., ["N130", "MA01"]). Null or empty array if none

fields.name: service_facility_name
fields.description: Name of the facility where services were rendered (if different from billing provider)

fields.name: service_facility_npi
fields.description: NPI of the service facility (CMS-1500 Box 32b)

sections.title: Dates And Terms
sections.description: Dates And Terms fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Document Details
sections.description: Document Details fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Financials
sections.description: Financials fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Parties
sections.description: Parties fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Risk And Compliance
sections.description: Risk And Compliance fields extracted from the document.

completeness_checklist.description: All required fields are present or explicitly null with low confidence when absent.
Each declared section was reviewed for extractable evidence.
Object array fields use their item_schema for consistent nested extraction.
